items.title: Chemical accidents rise as Trump administration proposes weakening safety rules
items.summary: Chemicals from accidents that injured or killed people increased by nearly 50 percent in recent years.

items.title: Prediction Markets Let You Bet on Whether a Wildfire Will Burn Down Your Town
items.summary: Wildfire survivors call fire-prediction markets “morally reprehensible” and worry they could increase the risk of arson.
